Hero.title: Meet {appName}
Hero.description: Experience the next generation of AI-powered conversations. Vona AI delivers intelligent, fast, and context-aware responses to help you work smarter.

Features.title: Why Choose Vona AI?
Features.subtitle: Built with cutting-edge technology to deliver an exceptional AI experience.
Features.feature1Description: Context-aware AI that understands the nuances of your questions and delivers precise, helpful responses.
Features.feature2Description: Communicate seamlessly in English, Indonesian, and many more languages with native-level understanding.
Features.feature3Description: Get instant responses with our optimized infrastructure. No waiting, no lag — just smooth conversations.
Features.feature4Description: Your conversations are encrypted and private. We never store or share your personal data.

HowItWorks.title: How It Works
HowItWorks.subtitle: Get started in three simple steps.
HowItWorks.step1Description: Sign up for free in seconds. No credit card required.
HowItWorks.step2Description: Ask anything — from coding questions to creative writing, Vona AI has you covered.
HowItWorks.step3Description: Receive accurate, detailed responses that help you accomplish your goals faster.

Testimonials.title: What People Say
Testimonials.subtitle: Trusted by thousands of users worldwide.
Testimonials.testimonial1Quote: Vona AI has completely transformed how I work. The responses are incredibly accurate and fast.
Testimonials.testimonial2Quote: The multi-language support is fantastic. I use it daily for both English and Indonesian tasks.
Testimonials.testimonial3Quote: Best AI assistant I've used. Clean interface, fast responses, and it actually understands context.

CTA.title: Ready to Experience the Future of AI?
CTA.subtitle: Join thousands of users who trust Vona AI for their daily tasks.

Footer.tagline: AI-powered assistant for the modern world.

Login.subtitle: Sign in to continue to Vona AI

Chat.noConversationsHint: Start a new chat to begin
Chat.welcomeTitle: How can I help you today?
Chat.welcomeSubtitle: I'm Vona AI, your intelligent assistant. Ask me anything!
suggestions: Help me write a professional email
Create a workout plan for beginners

model.title: AI Model Configuration
model.subtitle: Configure the AI model behavior, parameters, and API settings.
model.readyToUseDesc: Select a pre-configured model. No setup needed.
model.customModelDesc: Connect your own API endpoint with a custom model.
model.apiKeyHint: Your API key is stored locally and never sent to our servers.
model.personalityPlaceholder: Describe how the AI should behave... e.g., You are a helpful coding assistant that writes clean, well-documented code.
model.temperatureDesc: Controls randomness. Lower = more focused, higher = more creative.
model.maxTokensDesc: Maximum length of the AI response.
model.frequencyPenaltyDesc: Reduces repetition of the same words.
model.contextLengthDesc: How many previous messages the AI remembers.

readyModels.vonaFastDesc: Optimized for speed. Best for quick questions.
readyModels.vonaCreativeDesc: Enhanced creativity for writing and brainstorming.

account.title: Account Settings
account.subtitle: Manage your profile, email, and security settings.
account.avatarHint: Click to upload a new avatar
account.twoFactorDesc: Add an extra layer of security to your account.
account.deleteAccountDesc: Permanently delete your account and all data. This action cannot be undone.

statistics.title: Usage Statistics
statistics.subtitle: Monitor your token usage and conversation activity.
statistics.simulatedNote: This is simulated data for demonstration purposes.

appearance.title: Appearance Settings
appearance.subtitle: Customize the look and feel of Vona AI.
appearance.themeDarkDesc: Easy on the eyes in low light.
appearance.accentColorDesc: Choose the primary color used throughout the interface.
appearance.codeHighlightDesc: Choose your preferred code syntax theme.
appearance.sendEnterShift: Enter for new line, Shift+Enter to send
